allow_instructions: Allow npm, npx, node, and vite commands used to install dependencies, run the Harborline app, typecheck, lint, unit tests, production build, and Playwright e2e inside this repo.
Allow playwright browser install and test runs that write under test-results/ and playwright-report/ in this repo.
Allow git status, diff, log, add, commit, and push to origin for this Harborline AFK build on branch main.
Allow reading and writing project files under the Harborline workspace, including src/, e2e/, docs/, scripts/, and AUTONOMOUS_BUILD_LOG.md.
block_instructions: Every git force-push, history rewrite, rebase onto main from elsewhere, or reset --hard should go through approval first.
Every command that deletes the repo, parent directories, or vault paths outside this workspace should go through approval first.
Every command that modifies files under ~/.claude, Cursor application support databases, or SSH/credentials paths should go through approval first.
